searchDocs.title: Intro
searchDocs.content: Intro Kitty is a lifecycle-managed Roblox framework for organizing services, controllers, components, and utilities. Use the API section for detailed reference and examples.

searchDocs.title: Utils
searchDocs.content: Utils Kitty utility namespace that groups helper modules for gameplay, platform, and formatting tasks.

searchDocs.content: </> Data.CreateStore( name: string, template: {[string]: any} ) → DataStore  Creates a data store adapter after Data.configure is provided.

searchDocs.title: configure​
searchDocs.content: </> Data.configure( ProfileStore: any, Replica: any ) → () Configures the data adapter factory with ProfileStore and Replica backends.

searchDocs.title: RegisterUtils​
searchDocs.content: </> Kitty.RegisterUtils(utilsFolder: Instance ) → () Registers utility modules from a folder into Kitty.Utils. If a utility name matches an existing utility, the custom one replaces it.

searchDocs.title: RegisterPackages​
searchDocs.content: </> Kitty.RegisterPackages(packagesFolder: Instance ) → () Registers package modules from a folder into Kitty root. Each ModuleScript is exposed as Kitty.. If a name matches an existing Kitty member, the custom package replaces it.

searchDocs.title: new​
searchDocs.content: </> Kitty.new(config: KittyConfig) → () Bootstraps Kitty and runs lifecycle phases.
